revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:Navbox with columns/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:Navbox_with_columns/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: See also collapsible groups
revision.text: {{lua|Module:Navbox|Module:Navbox/configuration|Module:Navbox with columns/configuration|Module:TableTools}} Implements {{tl|Navbox with columns}} == Usage == {{#invoke:Navbox with columns|navbox}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Navigational box metatemplates]] }} == See also == * {{tl|Navbox}} * [[Module:Navbox]] * {{tl|Navbox with collapsible groups}} * [[Module:Navbox with collapsible groups]] [[Category:Module documentation pages]]
